# Workspace Instructions

Use this repository as a React portfolio project with strict quality gates and documentation-first workflows.

## Priorities

- Preserve behavior and accessibility.
- Prefer small, focused changes.
- Keep docs and tests aligned with code changes.

## Project Commands

- Development: `npm run dev`
- Lint and quality: `npm run lint`, `npm run quality:check`
- Unit tests: `npm run test`
- Diagram/e2e checks: `npm run diagrams:test`
- Docs build: `npm run docs:build`

## Custom Agents

- Use the `Senior React Portfolio` custom agent for architecture, performance, testing, and maintainability tasks.
- Use the `Docs and Diagrams Specialist` custom agent for docs-only and Mermaid/diagram-focused tasks.

## Skills

- `vitest-test-maker`
- `playwright-test-maker`
- `rsuite-component-generator`
- `communication-grammar-coach`
